title: Flight Tickets
heroImageAlt: Departure board next to an airport gate area
intro: Book domestic and international flights from every airline at the best available fares, with the inclusions you need shown clearly before you pay.

sections.p:
Compare full-service and low-cost carriers side by side — SriLankan, Emirates, Qatar Airways, Etihad, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific, Malaysia Airlines, Thai Airways, IndiGo, FitsAir and many more — and pick the fare that suits your trip.

Results are ranked by total price by default; switch the sort to "Shortest" to see fastest connections, or "Earliest" / "Latest" to fit your day.

Search ONE-WAY journeys for maximum flexibility, RETURN journeys for the standard there-and-back, or MULTI-CITY to combine up to six flights on one ticket — useful for trips like Colombo → Singapore → Tokyo → Colombo.

Filter by number of stops, total travel time, layover airports, departure and arrival times, and preferred airlines. Choose your cabin from Economy through Premium Economy, Business and First.

The price you see is the total per traveller including base fare, all applicable taxes and mandatory carrier charges. Optional extras are shown clearly before you pay and only added if you choose them.

We display every fare’s inclusions in plain English — checked baggage allowance, change rules, cancellation rules, refundability and mileage accrual — so you can compare like-for-like across airlines.

When you pay by card, your booking is ticketed and your e-ticket arrives by email within minutes. Bank transfer bookings are ticketed once we confirm receipt of funds (usually within a few hours during business hours).

Every booking receives a unique FlyAir reference and an airline reservation reference (PNR). Use the airline PNR for online check-in and direct airline contact.

Track your booking from MANAGE BOOKING with your reference. Add or change baggage, select seats, request meals, change dates, or cancel. For complex requests our team is available on info@flyair.lk and 0788 788 788.
